prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约 18321→15165→10592→7158→10358，整体呈剧烈波动：2021–2024 年持续大幅前移（从 18321 名升至 7158 名），2025 年明显后移至 10358 名，近两年波动幅度超 3000 名；2025 年基准约 10358 名；该校在贵州省物理类（含原理科）招生计划 2021 年 50 人、2022 年 49 人、2023 年 52 人、2024 年 54 人、2025 年 59 人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026 年计划大幅增至 95 人，较 2025 年扩招约 61%，为近年最大增幅，显著增加招生名额，竞争压力明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 40 名，近年排名稳定在 38–40 名区间，处于中上游 985 梯队；2026 年声誉评价为偏正面，主要正面事件包括硕士毕业论文致谢保卫部默许拾荒老人进校等，展现人文关怀；抖音热度排名第 53（较热），综合热度约 59 万，短视频曝光处于中上水平；未见明显投档断档记录；生态学 A+、草学 A+、化学 A-、地理学 A-、生物学 A-，共 5 个 A- 及以上学科；草学与生态学为全国顶尖，与该校地理科学类、环境科学与工程类、生物技术等招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生以计算机类、电子信息类、 临床医学、口腔医学等工科/医科专业为主，2024–2026 年电子信息/通信、电气工程、计算机类持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学保持推荐热度；本省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 29.9 万人，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类约 29.7 万）基本持平，物理类考生数按近年占比估算约 20.6 万，与 2025 年（20.7 万）相近；省控线方面，2025 年物理类本科批 387 分、特殊类型线 483 分，较 2024 年（380 分/482 分）略有上升，反映整体竞争环境稳定；兰州大学位于甘肃省兰州市，距贵州较远，属跨省就读；该校在贵州招生规模近年持续扩大，2026 年物理类计划 95 人已属该校在黔较大招生省份之一，跨省地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的波动惯性、2026 年招生计划大幅扩招 61% 带来的竞争缓解效应，以及声誉偏正面、抖音较热、工科专业热度高对报考吸引力的正向拉动，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次将较 2025 年明显后移，但扩招幅度巨大使后移程度受到一定抑制；预测最低位次约 14100 名，区间 13600–14600 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category (including former Science) minimum rankings approximately 18321→15165→10592→7158→10358, showing drastic fluctuations overall: from 2021 to 2024, rankings continuously moved forward significantly (from 18321 to 7158), then in 2025 clearly moved backward to 10358, with a fluctuation range exceeding 3000 in recent two years; 2025 baseline approximately 10358; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Physics Category (including former Science) was 50 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 54 in 2024, 59 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend; 2026 plan significantly increases to 95, an expansion of about 61% compared to 2025, the largest increase in recent years, significantly increasing admission slots, markedly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; Soft Science main ranking 2026 approximately 40th, with stable rankings in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle 985 tier; 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, with major positive events including a master's thesis acknowledgment of the security department tacitly allowing a scavenger to enter the campus, demonstrating humanistic care; Douyin heat ranking 53rd (relatively hot), comprehensive heat approximately 590,000, short video exposure at an upper-middle level; no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded; Ecology A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above; Grass Science and Ecology are nationally top-tier, highly correlated with the university's enrollment majors such as Geographic Science, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Biotechnology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment mainly includes Computer Science, Electronic Information, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology and other engineering/medical majors; from 2024–2026, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science remain highly recommended, Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain recommendation heat; the province's 2026 total ordinary college entrance exam candidates approximately 299,000, basically flat compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category approximately 297,000), Physics Category candidates estimated at about 206,000 based on recent proportion, similar to 2025 (207,000); provincial control lines: 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch 387 points, special type line 483 points, slightly increased from 2024 (380/482), reflecting stable overall competition environment; Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu Province, far from Guizhou, requiring cross-province study; the university's enrollment scale in Guizhou has been expanding in recent years, with 2026 Physics Category plan of 95 already making it one of the larger enrollment provinces for the university in Guizhou, cross-province regional preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the fluctuation inertia of the significant ranking backward movement in 2025, the competition easing effect from the 61% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the positive pull from slightly positive reputation, relatively hot Douyin presence, and high popularity of engineering majors on application attractiveness, it is predicted that the 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking will clearly move backward compared to 2025, but the huge expansion scale will somewhat suppress the degree of backward movement; predicted minimum ranking approximately 14100, range 13600–14600.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment mainly includes Law, Political Science, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Sociology; from 2024 to 2026, Law maintains recommended popularity, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; in 2026, the province's total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates is approximately 299,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 91,000 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as 2025 (90,000); provincial control lines: in 2025, History Category undergraduate batch 458 points, special type line 517 points, slightly increased compared to 2024 (442 points/505 points); Lanzhou University is located in Gansu Province, far from Guizhou, requiring cross-province study; History Category 2026 plan 15 people, moderate scale, cross-province regional preference has a neutral impact on application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the slight backward movement trend in 2025 rankings, the competition relief effect from the 50% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, and the positive pull of a slightly positive reputation and relatively hot Douyin on application attractiveness, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 2486, range 2113–2859.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 兰州大学医学类在贵州省2021至2025年最低录取位次分别为18321、15165、10592、7158、10358，整体呈先升后降的波动走势。2021至2024年位次持续攀升（数字减小），反映 医学报考热度逐年增强；2025年位次回落至10358，与当年计划缩减至25人及专业结构调整有关。2026年医学类招生计划大幅扩增至34人（较2025年增加9人，增幅36%），扩招将 导致位次数字增大、录取门槛相对降低。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力雄厚。其医学学科依托学校整体平台，在西北地区具有重要影响力，临床医学、 口腔医学等专业享有较高声誉，对贵州省考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。贵州省医学类招生规模相对有限，兰州大学作为985高校的医学类批次，在省内具 有稀缺性。2026年扩招虽缓解部分竞争压力，但医学整体热度不减，位次不会出现大幅下滑。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年趋势，预测2026年兰州大学医学类在贵州省最低录取位次约为12395名，较2025年有所下降（更容易进），波动区间预计在12085至12705名之间。扩招是 位次下降的主要驱动因素，但医学报考热度与学校层次对位次形成一定支撑，降幅有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Lanzhou University's medical category in Guizhou Province from 2021 to 2025 were 18321, 15165, 10592, 7158, and 10358 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising then falling. From 2021 to 2024, rankings continued to climb (numbers decreasing), reflecting increasing popularity of medical applications year by year; in 2025, the ranking fell back to 10358, related to the reduction of the enrollment plan to 25 students and adjustments in program structure. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan significantly expands to 34 students (an increase of 9 students from 2025, a 36% increase), which will lead to larger ranking numbers and relatively lower admission thresholds.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, ranked among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with strong comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines, relying on the university's overall platform, have significant influence in the Northwest region, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors enjoying high reputations, providing sustained appeal to candidates in Guizhou Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity nationwide, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. The scale of medical enrollment in Guizhou Province is relatively limited, and Lanzhou University's medical batch, as a 985 university, has scarcity value within the province. Although the 2026 expansion alleviates some competitive pressure, the overall popularity of medicine remains high, and rankings will not experience a significant decline.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Lanzhou University's medical category in Guizhou Province in 2026 is approximately 12395, a decrease from 2025 (easier to enter), with a fluctuation range expected between 12085 and 12705. Expansion is the main driving factor for the ranking decline, but the popularity of medical applications and the university's level provide some support for the ranking, limiting the extent of the decline.
